releases.message:
• Added Confession Feature ( $confess {your confession}) 
• New Announcement feature (this current message for new updates)

• Added major, feature, patch, hotfix release types with reactions 
• New command ($latest) which fetches the latest version and displays it
• Fixed help command not working (Issue with discord embed message limit of 25 lines)
• Fixed issue with bot not playing music and having a seizure joining the voice channel (PyNaCl library has been removed and davey{new library for voice channel for newer discord.py version})
• Added new feature that when the bot goes offline, it sends a message "Bot Offline" before terminating the process (check #custom-bot for the latest status of bot)
• TaskForge can now talk with Tamabot (Some intense rivalry between bots now)

•  Versioning has been rewinded to 0.3 ~ onwards
• New help command system (with pages and buttons and no embeds for cleaner reading)
releases.ai_description:
Hey everyone! 🎉 We’ve just overhauled how you get help with **TaskForge**—it’s now way cleaner and easier to navigate.

We rewound versioning to **0.3** so you can see all the updates at a glance, and the new **help command** (`!help`) now uses pages with buttons instead of clunky embeds. No more scrolling through walls of text—just quick, organized info.

Give it a try! Let us know what you think. 👀

releases.message: - Added Supabase connection for database integration with future updates
releases.ai_description:
We’ve just dropped a **huge** upgrade that’ll change how TaskForge works under the hood—and that means better stuff for you down the line!

By switching to **Supabase**, we’re building a rock-solid foundation for future features, faster performance, and smoother reliability. Think of it like upgrading your server’s backbone—you won’t notice the change today, but everything will run *way* smoother tomorrow.

Stay tuned for what’s coming—this is just the start! 🚀

releases.message: - Added Supabase connection for database integration with future updates
releases.ai_description: We just hit a big milestone—TaskForge is now fully connected to Supabase! This opens the door for even more powerful features and customization in the future. Stay tuned for what’s coming next! 🚀

releases.message: Added Supabase connection for database integration with future updates
releases.ai_description: We just added **Supabase** as our new database backend—this unlocks some exciting features coming soon, like faster syncs and better reliability. No changes today, but stay tuned for what’s next! 🚀

releases.message: Added Leaderboard stats for number of messages in the server (context limit is 1000 messages per channel as the server is too big, but will sync for whole history of server in future)
releases.ai_description: We just added **leaderboard stats** for message counts—see who’s been most active in the server! Right now, it syncs up to 1,000 recent messages per channel, but we’ll expand that to full history soon. 📊
